en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
B: You can borrow this one first!
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: Ini ku adas ka yaku uri, emta marig hug?
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.
A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?
B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: Uxay ku! Mnkan ku sapah da.
en: B: I don't want it, I ate it at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: Supu ta mkan hndayu mu ha!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: Mkan su manu ska hidaw hug?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: Peekan ku hnapuy sapah pyasan ska hidaw.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: Mkan su manu ska hidaw hug?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: Hndayu ku ka jiyax sayang, supu ta mkan hndayu mu ha!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!
A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
B: I don't want it, I want to study.
A: Can you help me with the broom?
B: Okay, broom over here.

ab: Jyagi ku mangal galiq ssrus hug?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: Gaga ku smsik dxgal, lawa Siray dmayaw sunan hug?
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, you ask Siray to help you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: Mruciq bi ka babaw uqan, sai smrus han.
en: A: The table is dirty, go wipe it.
B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: Mruciq bi ka bling gagi gaga, sai smrus han.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: Iya han, ini mu qhdui smsik ka hini na.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: Phuya su malax meuyas patas kiya da?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: Tuhuy ku dangi musa meuyas uyas.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: Phuya malax meuyas patas kiya ka hiya da?
en: A: What does he do after school?
B: He said he was going swimming.
